name: create_xps
short_description: Create embedded source for XPS and add to the source fileset (Not supported anymore. Please use Vivado IP integrator.)
full_help:
create_xps

Description: 
Create embedded source for XPS and add to the source fileset (Not supported anymore. Please use Vivado IP integrator.)

Syntax: 
create_xps  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
source file name that was created

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Source name

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
